pipelines.description: pipeline().globalParameters.X — unsupported global parameter for library paths.
pipeline().globalParameters in URL concat — unsupported global parameter for API URLs.
pipeline().DataFactory — unsupported system variable for environment detection.
pipeline().TriggeredByPipelineRunId — unsupported system variable in UID generation.
activity().output.tasks[0].cluster_instance.cluster_id — unsupported deep output chain with index.
activity('name').output without sub-property — unsupported bare output reference in contains().

value.value: @if(equals(string(coalesce(item()?.condition, 'notFound')), 'notFound'), true, if(contains(variables('execution_outputs'), concat('"', coalesce(item()?.condition?.name, 'name_notFound'), '"')), if(contains(string(json(variables('execution_outputs'))[item().condition.name]), concat('"', coalesce(item()?.condition?.internal_name, item().condition.name), '"')), true, false), false))
@if(equals(string(coalesce(item()?.condition, 'notFound')), 'notFound'), concat('No condition for task: ', coalesce(item()?.name, 'unnamed')), concat('Outputs: ', variables('execution_outputs')))

pipelines.description: 5-level deep if/equals/coalesce/contains with item()?.X — the most complex unsupported pattern.
